# Third Party Notices

This extension vendors legacy Catapult Trace Viewer assets.

## Catapult Trace Viewer

Source: https://chromium.googlesource.com/catapult

The vendored `trace_viewer_full.html` asset is generated from Catapult's tracing viewer using `vulcanize_trace_viewer --config=full`.

## WebComponents Polyfill

Source: https://github.com/webcomponents/polyfills

The vendored `webcomponents.min.js` asset is required by the legacy Catapult viewer.
